event: Portrait of Christian II of Denmark and Norway
description: A half-length portrait sketch of a bearded man wearing a wide-brimmed black hat and a white ruffled collar over an unfinished garment. The face is rendered in detail with ruddy complexion, brown curly hair, and a full beard, while the torso and clothing remain as light pencil outlines. A faint green wash appears behind the figure's head against an otherwise plain beige background.

_meta.title: Christian II of Denmark and Norway
